channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 10th June
item.description:
ENWD PLEASE CUT HEDGE BACK TO BOUNDARY 26m 2 WAY STOP AND GO WITH FOOTWAY CLOSURE MARKED (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree branches blocking pavement, 10th June
item.description:
Tree branches are overhanging the pavement on the bridge preventing pedestrians safe passage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Meadow Close, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 10th June
item.description:
Please pass on to local AHR regarding replacing sign post Sign plates will be returned to depot
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 10th June
item.description:
PLEASE MAKE SAFE AND RETURN SIGN PLATES X2 TO DEPOT READ FOR AHR TO REINSTATE LANE CLOSURE (Damaged Sign Post)

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 10th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 10th June
item.description:
Please jet the gully outside the property which is causing flooding.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collection if potholes outside 22 Whittington Road, 10th June
item.description:
It has rained and so the temporary filling has come out. The road is also showing signs of cracking
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 10th June
item.description:
ENWD ARBS TEAM REQUIRED DAMAGED LIMB PLEASE CUT TO MAKE SAFE ROAD CLOSURE (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 pot holes one 80cm by 75 cm, one 110 by 100cm, 9th June
item.description:
The pot holes are out side number 11 Bournside. This is a small residential street (and a dead end) but twice a day Belmont school open its back gate and let all the taxi’s out when collecting and dropping off children at the school. Winton House nursery staff (on Warden hill road) park at the end of Bournside close and parents and taxi’s also drop and collect kids from Bournside school, parking in our little road. Consequently the road is getting too much use for its purpose. There is a strip of road which is getting more and more damaged- especially by the cars leaving Belmont school. This is mainly outside number 11 Bournside. But because of the number of cars parked on our street in the day, it is impossible to avoid the pot holes which are wide. They were a lot deeper but some neighbours have attempted to put some stones into them to make them less deep. The pot holes are getting gradually worse and have been there for months. Please could they been fixed as a matter of urgency. Sincerely Mrs S Wiegand (number 10)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Bournside Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging Cycle Path, 9th June
item.description:
Trees overhanging cycle path, obviously worse when wet as lower, causing obstruction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 64, 9th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Obstruction, 9th June
item.description:
Right of way that ran through Swindon Farm to the side of Gallagher retail park is still obstructed by building materials from the Persimmon development. As no further work can be undertaken on this site until junction 10 is completed 2028/2029 shouldn’t this right of way be opened up again?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A-1B, Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pitville park trampolines, 9th June
item.description:
Tear appearing in the rubber on the trampolines

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and roots being undermined possibly by rats, 9th June
item.description:
Tree located outside 50 Welland Lodge Road GL52 3HQ. Only noticed today when cutting verge grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Welland Lodge Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked for 3 months, 9th June
item.description:
I see you say the drain was cleared on 7 May. It obviously wasn’t. For clarity, this drain is in Brighton Road and not Hewlett Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Hewlett Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
